---
title: "Heatmap_Production"
author: "Alos Diallo"
date: "2025-08-05"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

Main EWAS
With Combat
```{r}
# ewas_metastasis_h6_normImmune.R     · 2025-07-18
# Single HiTIMED h = 6 → immune-fraction normalisation + EpiScore
# Phenotypes: any_mets · ln_only · distant

## ── USER SETTINGS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
idat_v1  <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/All_Data/DNA_Methylation/dm_data/no_match/idats/"
idat_v2  <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/All_Data/DNA_Methylation/dm_data/no_match/25_samples/"
meta_csv <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/data_all.csv"

phenotypes          <- c(any  = "any_mets",
                         ln   = "ln_only",
                         dist = "distant")
variance_percentile <- 0.90  # 0 ⇒ keep all CpGs

msg <- function(...) cat("[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "]", ..., "\n")

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(minfi)
  library(sesame)
  library(ENmix)
  library(matrixStats)
  library(limma)
  library(sva)
  library(HiTIMED)
  library(EpiDISH)
  library(tidyverse)
  library(glue)
})

read_csv_silent <- function(file, ...) {
  if (utils::packageVersion("readr") >= "2.0.0") {
    readr::read_csv(file, show_col_types = FALSE, ...)
  } else {
    suppressMessages(readr::read_csv(file, ...))
  }
}

## ── 1) β-matrix (cached) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
cache_dir <- "results_ewas_cache"
dir.create(cache_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)
beta_rds  <- file.path(cache_dir, "beta_comb_qc.rds")

read_pp <- function(path, tag) {
  rg  <- read.metharray.exp(path, recursive=TRUE, extended=TRUE, force=TRUE)
  bet <- getBeta(preprocessNoob(rg, dyeMethod="single"))
  if (tag == "v2") bet <- betasCollapseToPfx(bet)
  bad <- ENmix::QCinfo(rg)$badCpG
  bet[ setdiff(rownames(bet), bad), ]
}

if (!file.exists(beta_rds)) {
  msg("Reading / normalising IDATs …")
  beta1 <- read_pp(idat_v1, "v1")
  beta2 <- read_pp(idat_v2, "v2")
  common    <- intersect(rownames(beta1), rownames(beta2))
  beta_comb <- cbind(beta1[common, ], beta2[common, ])
  saveRDS(beta_comb, beta_rds)
  msg("β-matrix cached.")
} else {
  beta_comb <- readRDS(beta_rds)
  msg("β-matrix loaded from cache.")
}

##--- Remove sex linked probes--##
get_annotation_for <- function(beta_mat) {
  # Prefer EPIC; fallback to 450k
  if (requireNamespace("IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19", quietly = TRUE)) {
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(
      library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
    )
    a <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
  } else if (requireNamespace("IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19", quietly = TRUE)) {
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(
      library(IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19)
    )
    a <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19)
  } else {
    stop("Install an Illumina methylation annotation package (EPIC or 450k).")
  }
  # Keep rows that exist in your beta matrix
  a[rownames(a) %in% rownames(beta_mat), , drop = FALSE]
}

anno <- get_annotation_for(beta_comb)

# Try multiple possible chromosome fields across annotation versions
chr_vec <- NULL
if ("chr" %in% colnames(anno))       chr_vec <- anno$chr
if (is.null(chr_vec) && "CHR" %in% colnames(anno)) chr_vec <- anno$CHR
if (is.null(chr_vec) && "seqnames" %in% colnames(anno)) chr_vec <- as.character(anno$seqnames)

if (is.null(chr_vec)) stop("Could not find chromosome column in annotation.")

is_sex_chr <- chr_vec %in% c("chrX","chrY","X","Y")
sex_probes <- rownames(anno)[is_sex_chr]

n_before <- nrow(beta_comb)
if (length(sex_probes) > 0) {
  beta_comb <- beta_comb[setdiff(rownames(beta_comb), sex_probes), , drop = FALSE]
}
msg(length(sex_probes), " chrX/chrY probes removed; ",
    n_before, " → ", nrow(beta_comb), " CpGs remain.")
## ── Variance filter ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
M.mat <- log2(beta_comb / (1 - beta_comb) + 1e-6)
if (variance_percentile > 0) {
  var_thr   <- quantile(rowVars(M.mat, TRUE), variance_percentile)
  keep      <- rowVars(M.mat, TRUE) > var_thr
  beta_comb <- beta_comb[keep, ]
  M.mat     <- M.mat[keep, ]
  msg(sum(keep), " CpGs kept (top ",
      100 * (1 - variance_percentile), "% var).")
}

## ── 2a) Define & run EpiScore for fibroblasts ────────────────────────────────
data(centEpiFibIC.m)  # built-in colon-fibroblast reference

run_episcore <- function(beta) {
  common <- intersect(rownames(beta), rownames(centEpiFibIC.m))
  est    <- epidish(beta[common, ],
                    centEpiFibIC.m[common, ],
                    method = "RPC")$estF
  as.data.frame(est) * 100    # columns = Epi, Fib, IC
}

msg("Running EpiScore (RPC) for fibroblast …")
fib_scores <- run_episcore(beta_comb) %>%
  rownames_to_column("SampleID")
# fib_scores has SampleID, Epi, Fib, IC

## ── 2b) HiTIMED deconvolution (h = 6) ────────────────────────────────────────
msg("Running HiTIMED  h = 6 …")
frac_h6 <- HiTIMED_deconvolution(beta_comb, "COAD", h = 6) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>%
  left_join(fib_scores, by = "SampleID")
# now frac_h6 includes a "Fib" column (from EpiScore)

## ── 3) Collapse / normalise fractions ───────────────────────────────────────
collapse_frac <- function(df) {
  get_ <- function(x) if (x %in% names(df)) df[[x]] else 0
  
  imm_cols <- c("CD8mem","CD8nv","CD4mem","CD4nv",
                "Treg","Bmem","Bnv","DC","Mono","NK")
  totalImm <- rowSums(df[imm_cols], na.rm = TRUE)
  totalImm[totalImm == 0] <- NA
  
  tibble(
    SampleID     = df$SampleID,
    Tumor        = get_("Tumor"),
    Fibroblast   = get_("Fib"),       # now uses EpiScore Fib
    StromalOther = get_("Endothelial") + get_("Epithelial"),
    CD8_T        = (get_("CD8mem") + get_("CD8nv")) / totalImm,
    LymphOther   = (get_("CD4mem") + get_("CD4nv") +
                    get_("Treg")   + get_("Bmem") + get_("Bnv")) / totalImm
  ) %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), as.numeric))
}

## ── 4) Tier templates ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────
tier_template <- list(
  Tier1 = c("age","sex_num","MLH1_num"),
  Tier2 = c("age","sex_num","MLH1_num","Tumor"),
  Tier3 = c("age","sex_num","MLH1_num","Tumor",
            "Fibroblast","StromalOther",
            "CD8_T","LymphOther")
)
trim_tiers <- function(tiers, avail) lapply(tiers, intersect, avail)

## ── 5) Loop over phenotypes ────────────────────────────────────────────────
for (pheno_tag in names(phenotypes)) {
  pheno_var <- phenotypes[[pheno_tag]]
  msg("\n===== ", pheno_var, " =====")
  
meta <- read_csv_silent(meta_csv) %>%
  mutate(
    SampleID      = paste(Sentrix_ID, Sentrix_Position, sep = "_"),
    any_mets      = as.integer(any_mets),
    distant       = as.integer(Distant_Mets),
    ln_only       = as.integer(ln_only),
    sex_num       = as.integer(sex == "M"),
    MLH1_num      = as.integer(MLH1 == 1),
    Array_Version = ifelse(SampleID %in% colnames(beta_comb), "v1", "v2")
  )
  
  meta$pheno_bin <- case_when(
    pheno_var == "any_mets" ~ meta$any_mets,
    pheno_var == "distant"  ~ meta$distant,
    pheno_var == "ln_only"  ~ (meta$ln_only & !meta$distant),
    TRUE                    ~ NA_integer_
  )
  stopifnot(all(meta$pheno_bin %in% 0:1))
  
  frac_df  <- collapse_frac(frac_h6)
  meta_all <- left_join(meta, frac_df, by = "SampleID")
  ok       <- complete.cases(meta_all[, tier_template$Tier3])
  meta_f   <- meta_all[ok, ]
  M_f      <- M.mat[, meta_f$SampleID]
  
  if (length(unique(meta_f$Array_Version)) > 1) {
    mod_cb <- model.matrix(~ age + sex_num + MLH1_num + pheno_bin, meta_f)
    M_cb   <- ComBat(M_f,
                     batch       = factor(meta_f$Array_Version),
                     mod         = mod_cb,
                     par.prior   = TRUE,
                     prior.plots = FALSE)
  } else {
    M_cb <- M_f
  }
  
  tier_list <- trim_tiers(tier_template, names(meta_f))
  fits <- map(tier_list, function(covs) {
    nz   <- covs[sapply(meta_f[covs], sd, TRUE) > 0]
    form <- if (length(nz) == 0) {
      ~ pheno_bin
    } else {
      as.formula(paste("~ pheno_bin +", paste(nz, collapse = " + ")))
    }
    des <- model.matrix(form, meta_f)
    eBayes(lmFit(M_cb, des), trend = TRUE, robust = TRUE)
  })
  
  out_dir <- file.path(glue("results_ewas_{pheno_tag}"), "H6")
  dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  saveRDS(fits, file.path(out_dir, "ewas_fits.rds"))
  msg("✓  fits saved → ", out_dir)
}

msg("\n✅ Finished: Any, LN-only, Distant  (HiTIMED-h6, immune-normalised + EpiScore)")
```


Without Combat
```{r}
# ewas_metastasis_h6_normImmune.R     · 2025-07-18
# Single HiTIMED h = 6 → immune-fraction normalisation + EpiScore
# Phenotypes: any_mets · ln_only · distant
# NOTE: ComBat is DISABLED — same-cohort v1/v2; using intersected probes instead.

## ── USER SETTINGS ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────
idat_v1  <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/All_Data/DNA_Methylation/dm_data/no_match/idats/"
idat_v2  <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/All_Data/DNA_Methylation/dm_data/no_match/25_samples/"
meta_csv <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/data_all.csv"

phenotypes          <- c(any  = "any_mets",
                         ln   = "ln_only",
                         dist = "distant")
variance_percentile <- 0.90  # 0 ⇒ keep all CpGs

## NEW: centralize outputs/caches here
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"

msg <- function(...) cat("[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "]", ..., "\n")

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(minfi)
  library(sesame)
  library(ENmix)
  library(matrixStats)
  library(limma)
  # library(sva)   # <- not needed since ComBat is off
  library(HiTIMED)
  library(EpiDISH)
  library(tidyverse)
  library(glue)
})

read_csv_silent <- function(file, ...) {
  if (utils::packageVersion("readr") >= "2.0.0") {
    readr::read_csv(file, show_col_types = FALSE, ...)
  } else {
    suppressMessages(readr::read_csv(file, ...))
  }
}

## ── 1) β-matrix (cached) ────────────────────────────────────────────────────
## cache under Results
cache_dir <- file.path(results_root, "ewas_cache")
dir.create(cache_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)
beta_rds      <- file.path(cache_dir, "beta_comb_qc.rds")
manifest_csv  <- file.path(cache_dir, "sample_manifest_v1_v2.csv")

read_pp <- function(path, tag) {
  rg  <- read.metharray.exp(path, recursive = TRUE, extended = TRUE, force = TRUE)
  bet <- getBeta(preprocessNoob(rg, dyeMethod = "single"))
  if (tag == "v2") bet <- betasCollapseToPfx(bet)
  bad <- ENmix::QCinfo(rg)$badCpG
  bet <- bet[ setdiff(rownames(bet), bad), , drop = FALSE]
  bet
}

## Save sample IDs per platform so we can label Array_Version later
if (!file.exists(beta_rds)) {
  msg("Reading / normalising IDATs …")
  beta1 <- read_pp(idat_v1, "v1")
  beta2 <- read_pp(idat_v2, "v2")

  sample_ids_v1 <- colnames(beta1)
  sample_ids_v2 <- colnames(beta2)

  common <- intersect(rownames(beta1), rownames(beta2))
  stopifnot(length(common) > 0)
  beta_comb <- cbind(beta1[common, , drop = FALSE],
                     beta2[common, , drop = FALSE])

  saveRDS(list(beta = beta_comb,
               sample_ids_v1 = sample_ids_v1,
               sample_ids_v2 = sample_ids_v2),
          beta_rds)

  tibble(
    SampleID = c(sample_ids_v1, sample_ids_v2),
    Array_Version = c(rep("v1", length(sample_ids_v1)),
                      rep("v2", length(sample_ids_v2)))
  ) %>%
    distinct() %>%
    write_csv(manifest_csv)

  msg("β-matrix cached.")
} else {
  cache_obj <- readRDS(beta_rds)
  if (is.list(cache_obj) && !is.null(cache_obj$beta)) {
    beta_comb     <- cache_obj$beta
    sample_ids_v1 <- cache_obj$sample_ids_v1
    sample_ids_v2 <- cache_obj$sample_ids_v2
  } else {
    ## backward compat if the RDS used to be only the matrix
    beta_comb     <- cache_obj
    sample_ids_v1 <- character(0)
    sample_ids_v2 <- character(0)
  }
  msg("β-matrix loaded from cache.")
}

## --- Remove sex-linked probes ----------------------------------------------
get_annotation_for <- function(beta_mat) {
  if (requireNamespace("IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19", quietly = TRUE)) {
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19))
    a <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
  } else if (requireNamespace("IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19", quietly = TRUE)) {
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19))
    a <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylation450kanno.ilmn12.hg19)
  } else {
    stop("Install an Illumina methylation annotation package (EPIC or 450k).")
  }
  a[rownames(a) %in% rownames(beta_mat), , drop = FALSE]
}

anno <- get_annotation_for(beta_comb)

# Try multiple possible chromosome fields across annotation versions
chr_vec <- NULL
if ("chr" %in% colnames(anno))             chr_vec <- anno$chr
if (is.null(chr_vec) && "CHR" %in% colnames(anno))      chr_vec <- anno$CHR
if (is.null(chr_vec) && "seqnames" %in% colnames(anno)) chr_vec <- as.character(anno$seqnames)
if (is.null(chr_vec)) stop("Could not find chromosome column in annotation.")

is_sex_chr <- chr_vec %in% c("chrX","chrY","X","Y")
sex_probes <- rownames(anno)[is_sex_chr]

n_before <- nrow(beta_comb)
if (length(sex_probes) > 0) {
  beta_comb <- beta_comb[setdiff(rownames(beta_comb), sex_probes), , drop = FALSE]
}
msg(length(sex_probes), " chrX/chrY probes removed; ",
    n_before, " → ", nrow(beta_comb), " CpGs remain.")

## ── Variance filter (optional) ──────────────────────────────────────────────
M.mat <- log2(beta_comb / pmax(1 - beta_comb, 1e-6) + 1e-6)
if (variance_percentile > 0) {
  v <- rowVars(M.mat, na.rm = TRUE)
  var_thr <- quantile(v, variance_percentile, na.rm = TRUE)
  keep    <- v > var_thr
  beta_comb <- beta_comb[keep, , drop = FALSE]
  M.mat     <- M.mat[keep, , drop = FALSE]
  msg(sum(keep), " CpGs kept (top ", 100 * (1 - variance_percentile), "% var).")
}

## ── 2a) EpiScore for fibroblasts (RPC) ──────────────────────────────────────
data(centEpiFibIC.m)  # built-in colon-fibroblast reference

run_episcore <- function(beta) {
  common <- intersect(rownames(beta), rownames(centEpiFibIC.m))
  est    <- epidish(beta[common, ],
                    centEpiFibIC.m[common, ],
                    method = "RPC")$estF
  as.data.frame(est) * 100    # columns = Epi, Fib, IC
}

msg("Running EpiScore (RPC) for fibroblast …")
fib_scores <- run_episcore(beta_comb) %>%
  rownames_to_column("SampleID")

## ── 2b) HiTIMED deconvolution (h = 6) ───────────────────────────────────────
msg("Running HiTIMED  h = 6 …")
frac_h6 <- HiTIMED_deconvolution(beta_comb, "COAD", h = 6) %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  rownames_to_column("SampleID") %>%
  left_join(fib_scores, by = "SampleID")   # adds Fib from EpiScore

## ── 3) Collapse / normalise fractions ───────────────────────────────────────
collapse_frac <- function(df) {
  get_ <- function(x) if (x %in% names(df)) df[[x]] else 0
  imm_cols <- c("CD8mem","CD8nv","CD4mem","CD4nv","Treg","Bmem","Bnv","DC","Mono","NK")
  totalImm <- rowSums(df[imm_cols], na.rm = TRUE); totalImm[totalImm == 0] <- NA
  tibble(
    SampleID     = df$SampleID,
    Tumor        = get_("Tumor"),
    Fibroblast   = get_("Fib"),               # from EpiScore
    StromalOther = get_("Endothelial") + get_("Epithelial"),
    CD8_T        = (get_("CD8mem") + get_("CD8nv")) / totalImm,
    LymphOther   = (get_("CD4mem") + get_("CD4nv") +
                    get_("Treg")   + get_("Bmem") + get_("Bnv")) / totalImm
  ) %>% mutate(across(where(is.numeric), as.numeric))
}

## ── 4) Tier templates (unchanged design) ────────────────────────────────────
tier_template <- list(
  Tier1 = c("age","sex_num","MLH1_num"),
  Tier2 = c("age","sex_num","MLH1_num","Tumor"),
  Tier3 = c("age","sex_num","MLH1_num","Tumor",
            "Fibroblast","StromalOther",
            "CD8_T","LymphOther")
)
trim_tiers <- function(tiers, avail) lapply(tiers, intersect, avail)

## ── 5) Loop over phenotypes (NO ComBat) ─────────────────────────────────────
for (pheno_tag in names(phenotypes)) {
  pheno_var <- phenotypes[[pheno_tag]]
  msg("\n===== ", pheno_var, " =====")

  meta <- read_csv_silent(meta_csv) %>%
    mutate(
      SampleID      = paste(Sentrix_ID, Sentrix_Position, sep = "_"),
      any_mets      = as.integer(any_mets),
      distant       = as.integer(Distant_Mets),
      ln_only       = as.integer(ln_only),
      sex_num       = as.integer(sex == "M"),
      MLH1_num      = as.integer(MLH1 == 1)
    )

  ## Use saved vectors to tag array version (for reference only)
  meta <- meta %>%
    mutate(
      Array_Version = case_when(
        SampleID %in% sample_ids_v1 ~ "v1",
        SampleID %in% sample_ids_v2 ~ "v2",
        TRUE                        ~ NA_character_
      )
    )

  if (any(is.na(meta$Array_Version))) {
    miss <- meta$SampleID[is.na(meta$Array_Version)]
    msg("WARNING: ", length(miss), " meta SampleIDs not matched to v1/v2: ",
        paste(head(miss, 8), collapse = ", "),
        if (length(miss) > 8) " …" else "")
  }

  meta$pheno_bin <- dplyr::case_when(
    pheno_var == "any_mets" ~ meta$any_mets,
    pheno_var == "distant"  ~ meta$distant,
    pheno_var == "ln_only"  ~ (meta$ln_only & !meta$distant),
    TRUE                    ~ NA_integer_
  )
  stopifnot(all(meta$pheno_bin %in% 0:1, na.rm = TRUE))

  frac_df  <- collapse_frac(frac_h6)
  meta_all <- left_join(meta, frac_df, by = "SampleID")
  ok       <- complete.cases(meta_all[, tier_template$Tier3])
  meta_f   <- meta_all[ok, , drop = FALSE]
  M_f      <- M.mat[, meta_f$SampleID, drop = FALSE]

  ## NO ComBat: same-cohort v1/v2 + intersected probes is sufficient
  M_cb <- M_f

  tier_list <- trim_tiers(tier_template, names(meta_f))
  fits <- purrr::map(tier_list, function(covs) {
    # Only numeric covariates with non-zero variance; use stats::sd explicitly
    is_var <- vapply(
      meta_f[covs],
      function(x) is.numeric(x) && is.finite(stats::sd(x, na.rm = TRUE)) && stats::sd(x, na.rm = TRUE) > 0,
      logical(1)
    )
    nz <- covs[is_var]

    form <- if (length(nz) == 0) {
      ~ pheno_bin
    } else {
      as.formula(paste("~ pheno_bin +", paste(nz, collapse = " + ")))
    }
    des <- model.matrix(form, meta_f)
    eBayes(lmFit(M_cb, des), trend = TRUE, robust = TRUE)
  })

  ## write results under Results root
  out_dir <- file.path(results_root, glue("results_ewas_{pheno_tag}"), "H6")
  dir.create(out_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)
  saveRDS(fits, file.path(out_dir, "ewas_fits.rds"))
  msg("✓  fits saved → ", out_dir)
}

msg("\n✅ Finished: Any, LN-only, Distant  (HiTIMED-h6, immune-normalised + EpiScore; NO ComBat)")
```


Gene list:
```{r}
###############################################################################
# summarize_top_cpgs.R
# - For each phenotype (any, ln, dist):
#   - Identify top hyper/hypo CpGs from that phenotype's EWAS (Tier3).
#   - Create SEPARATE summary tables for hyper and hypo CpGs.
# - Matches the EWAS output layout from your current pipeline.
###############################################################################

## --------------- USER SETTINGS ------------------------------------------- ##
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"

h_level <- "H6"      # <- current pipeline saves under H6
tier    <- "Tier3"   # use the Tier3 fit

top_n   <- 100       # number of hyper and hypo CpGs to output per phenotype

# Where to save the final summary tables
output_dir <- file.path(results_root, "results_summary")
dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

## --------------- SETUP ---------------------------------------------------- ##
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(limma); library(dplyr); library(glue)
  library(readr); library(tibble)
})

msg <- function(...) cat("[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "]", ..., "\n")

## Optional: EPIC annotation (for Gene column)
get_epic_annotation <- function() {
  if (requireNamespace("IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19", quietly = TRUE)) {
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(
      library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
    )
    getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
  } else {
    warning("EPIC annotation package not available; 'Gene' column will be NA.")
    NULL
  }
}

###############################################################################
##  1. LOAD ALL EWAS RESULTS
###############################################################################
msg("Loading all EWAS results...")

phenotypes <- c("any", "ln", "dist")
all_results <- list()

for (ph_tag in phenotypes) {
  fit_file <- file.path(results_root, glue("results_ewas_{ph_tag}"), h_level, "ewas_fits.rds")
  if (!file.exists(fit_file)) {
    warning(glue("Could not find fits file for phenotype '{ph_tag}' at: {fit_file}. Skipping."))
    next
  }

  fits <- readRDS(fit_file)

  if (!tier %in% names(fits)) {
    warning(glue("Tier '{tier}' not found for phenotype '{ph_tag}'. Skipping."))
    next
  }

  fit_obj <- fits[[tier]]
  if (!inherits(fit_obj, "MArrayLM")) {
    # some pipelines store as list with $fit
    fit_obj <- fit_obj$fit
  }

  # Extract a full table, explicitly by the phenotype coefficient
  tt <- topTable(fit_obj, coef = "pheno_bin", number = Inf, p.value = 1, adjust.method = "BH") %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column("CpG_ID")

  all_results[[ph_tag]] <- tt
}

if (length(all_results) == 0) {
  stop("No EWAS results found. Check 'results_root', 'h_level', and that fits were saved.")
}

###############################################################################
##  2. LOAD/BUILD ANNOTATION MAP (optional Gene column)
###############################################################################
anno <- get_epic_annotation()
probe2gene <- NULL
if (!is.null(anno)) {
  # EPIC annotation: Name = probe ID (cg...), UCSC_RefGene_Name = semicolon-separated genes
  gn <- as.character(anno$UCSC_RefGene_Name)
  gn <- sub(";.*$", "", gn)  # first listed gene
  names(gn) <- as.character(anno$Name)
  probe2gene <- gn
}

###############################################################################
##  3. MAIN LOOP TO GENERATE TABLES FOR EACH PHENOTYPE
###############################################################################
for (primary_phenotype in phenotypes) {

  if (!primary_phenotype %in% names(all_results)) next  # Skip if missing

  msg(glue::glue("--- Generating summary tables for top hits from '{primary_phenotype}' ---"))

  primary_results <- all_results[[primary_phenotype]]

  # Ensure needed columns exist
  need_cols <- c("CpG_ID", "logFC", "P.Value", "adj.P.Val")
  if (!all(need_cols %in% names(primary_results))) {
    warning(glue::glue(
      "Primary results for '{primary_phenotype}' missing required cols: ",
      "{paste(setdiff(need_cols, names(primary_results)), collapse=', ')}. Skipping."
    ))
    next
  }

  # --- HYPER: logFC > 0, ordered by P (smallest first), take top_n
  top_hyper_ids <- primary_results %>%
    dplyr::filter(is.finite(P.Value), logFC > 0) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(P.Value) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = top_n) %>%
    dplyr::pull(CpG_ID)

  summary_table_hyper <- primary_results %>%
    dplyr::filter(CpG_ID %in% top_hyper_ids) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(P.Value) %>%
    dplyr::select(CpG_ID, logFC, P.Value, adj.P.Val) %>%
    dplyr::rename_with(~ glue::glue("{.}_{primary_phenotype}"), .cols = -CpG_ID)

  # --- HYPO: logFC < 0, ordered by P (smallest first), take top_n
  top_hypo_ids <- primary_results %>%
    dplyr::filter(is.finite(P.Value), logFC < 0) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(P.Value) %>%
    dplyr::slice_head(n = top_n) %>%
    dplyr::pull(CpG_ID)

  summary_table_hypo <- primary_results %>%
    dplyr::filter(CpG_ID %in% top_hypo_ids) %>%
    dplyr::arrange(P.Value) %>%
    dplyr::select(CpG_ID, logFC, P.Value, adj.P.Val) %>%
    dplyr::rename_with(~ glue::glue("{.}_{primary_phenotype}"), .cols = -CpG_ID)

  # Add P-values from the other phenotypes
  other_phenotypes <- setdiff(phenotypes, primary_phenotype)
  for (ph_tag in other_phenotypes) {
    if (!ph_tag %in% names(all_results)) next
    pvals <- all_results[[ph_tag]] %>%
      dplyr::select(CpG_ID, P.Value) %>%
      dplyr::rename(!!glue::glue("P.Value_{ph_tag}") := P.Value)

    summary_table_hyper <- dplyr::left_join(summary_table_hyper, pvals, by = "CpG_ID")
    summary_table_hypo  <- dplyr::left_join(summary_table_hypo,  pvals, by = "CpG_ID")
  }

  # Add Gene column (if annotation available)
  if (!is.null(probe2gene)) {
    summary_table_hyper <- summary_table_hyper %>%
      dplyr::mutate(Gene = unname(probe2gene[CpG_ID]), .after = CpG_ID)
    summary_table_hypo <- summary_table_hypo %>%
      dplyr::mutate(Gene = unname(probe2gene[CpG_ID]), .after = CpG_ID)
  } else {
    summary_table_hyper <- summary_table_hyper %>%
      dplyr::mutate(Gene = NA_character_, .after = CpG_ID)
    summary_table_hypo <- summary_table_hypo %>%
      dplyr::mutate(Gene = NA_character_, .after = CpG_ID)
  }

  # Write out
  out_hyper <- file.path(output_dir, glue::glue("Top{top_n}_DMPs_Summary_from_{primary_phenotype}_hyper.csv"))
  out_hypo  <- file.path(output_dir, glue::glue("Top{top_n}_DMPs_Summary_from_{primary_phenotype}_hypo.csv"))

  readr::write_csv(summary_table_hyper, out_hyper)
  readr::write_csv(summary_table_hypo,  out_hypo)

  msg(glue::glue("✓ Saved: {basename(out_hyper)}"))
  msg(glue::glue("✓ Saved: {basename(out_hypo)}"))
}

msg("\n✅  All summary tables created successfully.")
```

Expanded gene list information
```{r}
###############################################################################
# summarize_top_cpgs.R
# - For each phenotype (any, ln, dist):
#   - Creates summary tables for the Top 100 hyper/hypo CpGs.
#   - NEW: Creates a comprehensive table with ALL CpGs from the EWAS,
#     including gene annotations and beta values for every sample.
###############################################################################

## --------------- USER SETTINGS ------------------------------------------- ##
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"
meta_csv_path <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/data_all.csv" # Path to metadata

h_level <- "H6"
tier    <- "Tier3"
top_n   <- 100

output_dir <- file.path(results_root, "results_summary")
dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

## --------------- SETUP ---------------------------------------------------- ##
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(limma); library(dplyr); library(glue)
  library(readr); library(tibble)
})

msg <- function(...) cat("[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "]", ..., "\n")

get_epic_annotation <- function() {
  if (requireNamespace("IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19", quietly = TRUE)) {
    suppressPackageStartupMessages(library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19))
    getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
  } else {
    warning("EPIC annotation package not available; 'Gene' column will be NA.")
    NULL
  }
}

###############################################################################
##  NEW: 1. LOAD BETA MATRIX AND METADATA
###############################################################################
msg("Loading main beta matrix and metadata...")

beta_rds <- file.path(results_root, "ewas_cache", "beta_comb_qc.rds")
if (!file.exists(beta_rds)) {
  stop("Beta matrix cache file not found at: ", beta_rds)
}
# Assuming the RDS contains a list with a 'beta' element
beta_comb <- readRDS(beta_rds)$beta

meta <- read_csv(meta_csv_path, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    SampleID = paste(Sentrix_ID, Sentrix_Position, sep = "_"),
    Group = factor(if_else(any_mets == 1, "Metastasis", "No Metastasis"),
                   levels = c("No Metastasis", "Metastasis"))
  ) %>%
  # Filter to samples present in the beta matrix and arrange them
  filter(SampleID %in% colnames(beta_comb)) %>%
  arrange(Group)

# Order the beta matrix columns to match the ordered metadata
beta_comb_ordered <- beta_comb[, meta$SampleID]


###############################################################################
##  2. LOAD ALL EWAS RESULTS
###############################################################################
msg("Loading all EWAS results...")

phenotypes <- c("any", "ln", "dist")
all_results <- list()

for (ph_tag in phenotypes) {
  fit_file <- file.path(results_root, glue("results_ewas_{ph_tag}"), h_level, "ewas_fits.rds")
  if (!file.exists(fit_file)) {
    warning(glue("Could not find fits file for phenotype '{ph_tag}'. Skipping."))
    next
  }
  fits <- readRDS(fit_file)
  if (!tier %in% names(fits)) {
    warning(glue("Tier '{tier}' not found for phenotype '{ph_tag}'. Skipping."))
    next
  }
  fit_obj <- fits[[tier]]; if (!inherits(fit_obj, "MArrayLM")) fit_obj <- fit_obj$fit
  tt <- topTable(fit_obj, coef = "pheno_bin", number = Inf, p.value = 1, adjust.method = "BH") %>%
    tibble::rownames_to_column("CpG_ID")
  all_results[[ph_tag]] <- tt
}
if (length(all_results) == 0) {
  stop("No EWAS results found.")
}

###############################################################################
##  3. LOAD/BUILD ANNOTATION MAP
###############################################################################
anno <- get_epic_annotation()
probe2gene <- NULL
if (!is.null(anno)) {
  gn <- as.character(anno$UCSC_RefGene_Name)
  gn <- sub(";.*$", "", gn)
  names(gn) <- as.character(anno$Name)
  probe2gene <- gn
}

###############################################################################
##  4. MAIN LOOP TO GENERATE TABLES FOR EACH PHENOTYPE
###############################################################################
for (primary_phenotype in phenotypes) {

  if (!primary_phenotype %in% names(all_results)) next
  
  msg(glue::glue("--- Generating tables for '{primary_phenotype}' ---"))
  primary_results <- all_results[[primary_phenotype]]

  # --- A. Generate and save the full data file with beta values ---
  
  # Get CpGs that are in both the EWAS results and the main beta matrix
  common_cpgs <- intersect(primary_results$CpG_ID, rownames(beta_comb_ordered))
  
  # Prepare the parts: stats, genes, and beta values
  stats_part <- primary_results %>% dplyr::filter(CpG_ID %in% common_cpgs)
  gene_part  <- tibble(CpG_ID = common_cpgs, Gene = unname(probe2gene[common_cpgs]))
  beta_part  <- as.data.frame(beta_comb_ordered[common_cpgs, ]) %>% rownames_to_column("CpG_ID")
  
  # Join everything together
  full_data_table <- stats_part %>%
    left_join(gene_part, by = "CpG_ID") %>%
    left_join(beta_part, by = "CpG_ID") %>%
    # Reorder columns for clarity
    dplyr::select(CpG_ID, Gene, logFC, P.Value, adj.P.Val, everything())
    
  # Write out the full table
  out_full <- file.path(output_dir, glue::glue("Full_EWAS_Results_with_Betas_{primary_phenotype}.csv"))
  readr::write_csv(full_data_table, out_full)
  msg(glue::glue("✓ Saved full data: {basename(out_full)}"))

  # --- B. Generate and save the Top N summary tables (original functionality) ---
  
  top_hyper_ids <- primary_results %>%
    filter(is.finite(P.Value), logFC > 0) %>% arrange(P.Value) %>% slice_head(n = top_n) %>% pull(CpG_ID)
  summary_table_hyper <- primary_results %>%
    filter(CpG_ID %in% top_hyper_ids) %>% arrange(P.Value) %>% dplyr::select(CpG_ID, logFC, P.Value, adj.P.Val) %>%
    rename_with(~ glue("{.}_{primary_phenotype}"), .cols = -CpG_ID)

  top_hypo_ids <- primary_results %>%
    filter(is.finite(P.Value), logFC < 0) %>% arrange(P.Value) %>% slice_head(n = top_n) %>% pull(CpG_ID)
  summary_table_hypo <- primary_results %>%
    filter(CpG_ID %in% top_hypo_ids) %>% arrange(P.Value) %>% dplyr::select(CpG_ID, logFC, P.Value, adj.P.Val) %>%
    rename_with(~ glue("{.}_{primary_phenotype}"), .cols = -CpG_ID)

  # Add Gene column
  if (!is.null(probe2gene)) {
    summary_table_hyper <- summary_table_hyper %>% mutate(Gene = unname(probe2gene[CpG_ID]), .after = CpG_ID)
    summary_table_hypo  <- summary_table_hypo  %>% mutate(Gene = unname(probe2gene[CpG_ID]), .after = CpG_ID)
  }
  
  # Write out Top N tables
  out_hyper <- file.path(output_dir, glue("Top{top_n}_DMPs_Summary_from_{primary_phenotype}_hyper.csv"))
  out_hypo  <- file.path(output_dir, glue("Top{top_n}_DMPs_Summary_from_{primary_phenotype}_hypo.csv"))
  readr::write_csv(summary_table_hyper, out_hyper)
  readr::write_csv(summary_table_hypo,  out_hypo)
  msg(glue("✓ Saved Top {top_n} summary: {basename(out_hyper)}"))
  msg(glue("✓ Saved Top {top_n} summary: {basename(out_hypo)}"))
}

msg("\n✅ All summary tables created successfully.")
```


Heatmap:

This produces two heatmaps, one hypo and one hyper with functional groups 
```{r}
###############################################################################
#  heatmap_DH_cohort_publication_split.R
#  - Two separate, publication‐quality heatmaps for “Any Metastasis” in the DH
#    cohort: one for hyper‐methylated CpGs and one for hypo‐methylated CpGs.
#  - Rows clustered *within* each functional group.
#  - Exports vector PDFs for Illustrator with a shared color scale.
###############################################################################

## ---------------- USER SETTINGS ------------------------------------------ ##
path_my_epic_v1 <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/All_Data/DNA_Methylation/dm_data/no_match/idats/"
path_my_epic_v2 <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/All_Data/DNA_Methylation/dm_data/no_match/25_samples/"
path_my_meta    <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/data_all.csv"

output_dir <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results/results_publication_figure"
dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)

# --- Curated CpG groups (UPDATED) --------------------------------------- ##
hyper_cpg_groups <- list(
  `Tumor Suppressor` = "cg21878275", # ADAMTS9
  `ECM & Adhesion`   = c("cg12567310","cg06355010","cg00919305","cg05542785","cg02987928"),
  Signaling          = c("cg26018901","cg02384486","cg04101351","cg02983495",
                         "cg07919466","cg16190211","cg03496114","cg12751521","cg06951626"),
  Trafficking        = c("cg21161492","cg11589947","cg09635067","cg18187581"),
  `Gene Regulation`  = c("cg24671348","cg03999372","cg14429204","cg07831351",
                         "cg25283029","cg18878907","cg13209567","cg18598844","cg00201175"),
  Metabolism         = c("cg25161512","cg16264705","cg13831329","cg10836173","cg07437373"),
  Survival           = c("cg09586459","cg01901788","cg16342439")
)

hypo_cpg_groups <- list(
  `Developmental TFs`    = c("cg26522592", "cg18716076", "cg07584855", "cg23936031", "cg10244666"),
  `Gene Regulation`      = c("cg19628988", "cg24478129", "cg04093349", "cg14255238", "cg27598407", "cg26472183", "cg21834645", "cg12459932"),
  `Signaling & Proliferation` = c("cg00100844", "cg14137625", "cg24176288", "cg06741896", "cg25819846", "cg14383549", "cg11003133"),
  `Cell Adhesion`        = c("cg01169021", "cg10917547", "cg21580428", "cg16673702", "cg23120934"),
  `Ion Transport`      = c("cg07186154", "cg07581739")
)

## ---------------- SETUP -------------------------------------------------- ##
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(minfi); library(pheatmap); library(sesame); library(dplyr)
  library(readr); library(tibble); library(RColorBrewer)
  library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
})

msg <- function(...) cat("[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "]", ..., "\n")

process_idats <- function(paths, cache_name, collapse_v2 = FALSE) {
  rds <- file.path(output_dir, cache_name)
  if (file.exists(rds)) return(readRDS(rds))
  msg("Processing: ", cache_name)
  rg  <- read.metharray(basenames = unique(sub("_Grn.idat|_Red.idat","",paths)), force=TRUE)
  bet <- getBeta(preprocessNoob(rg))
  if (collapse_v2) bet <- sesame::betasCollapseToPfx(bet)
  saveRDS(bet, rds); bet
}

cluster_inside <- function(cpgs, mat) {
  if (length(cpgs) <= 2) return(cpgs)
  cpgs[hclust(dist(mat[cpgs, ]))$order]
}

## 1) LOAD & PREPARE DH DATA -----------------------------------------------
msg("Loading DH cohort matrices…")
beta_v1 <- process_idats(list.files(path_my_epic_v1, full.names = TRUE, pattern = "idat$"), "dh_v1.rds")
beta_v2 <- process_idats(list.files(path_my_epic_v2, full.names = TRUE, pattern = "idat$"), "dh_v2.rds", collapse_v2 = TRUE)
common  <- intersect(rownames(beta_v1), rownames(beta_v2))
beta_dh <- cbind(beta_v1[common, ], beta_v2[common, ])

meta_dh <- read_csv(path_my_meta, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    SampleID = paste(Sentrix_ID, Sentrix_Position, sep="_"),
    Group    = factor(if_else(any_mets==1,"Metastasis","No Metastasis"),
                      levels=c("No Metastasis","Metastasis"))
  ) %>%
  filter(SampleID %in% colnames(beta_dh)) %>%
  arrange(Group)

beta_dh <- beta_dh[, meta_dh$SampleID]

## 2) PREPARE FOR PLOTTING --------------------------------------------------
msg("Building ordered CpG lists and annotations…")
anno_tbl   <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
probe2gene <- setNames(sub(";.*$", "", anno_tbl$UCSC_RefGene_Name), anno_tbl$Name)

# --- Reusable function to prepare data for one heatmap ---
prepare_for_pheatmap <- function(cpg_groups, beta_matrix) {
  groups_in_data <- lapply(cpg_groups, intersect, rownames(beta_matrix))
  cpgs_ordered <- unlist(lapply(groups_in_data, cluster_inside, beta_matrix), use.names=FALSE)
  
  labels <- sapply(cpgs_ordered, function(cpg_id) {
    gene_name <- probe2gene[cpg_id]
    if (!is.na(gene_name) && nzchar(gene_name)) {
      return(paste(gene_name, cpg_id, sep = "_"))
    } else {
      return(cpg_id)
    }
  })
  
  mat <- beta_matrix[cpgs_ordered, ]
  rownames(mat) <- labels
  
  find_group_func <- function(cpg) {
    for (nm in names(cpg_groups)) {
      if (cpg %in% cpg_groups[[nm]]) return(nm)
    }
    NA_character_
  }
  
  anno_row <- tibble(CpG = cpgs_ordered) %>%
    mutate(
      Functional_Group = factor(sapply(CpG, find_group_func), levels = names(cpg_groups))
    ) %>%
    column_to_rownames("CpG")
  rownames(anno_row) <- labels
  
  return(list(matrix = mat, annotation_row = anno_row))
}

# --- Prepare data for both heatmaps ---
hyper_data <- prepare_for_pheatmap(hyper_cpg_groups, beta_dh)
hypo_data  <- prepare_for_pheatmap(hypo_cpg_groups, beta_dh)

message("Hyper CpGs found in data: ", nrow(hyper_data$matrix))
message("Hypo  CpGs found in data: ", nrow(hypo_data$matrix))

# --- Create a shared, symmetric color scale ---
scaled_hyper <- t(scale(t(hyper_data$matrix)))
scaled_hypo  <- t(scale(t(hypo_data$matrix)))
max_val <- max(abs(range(c(scaled_hyper, scaled_hypo), na.rm = TRUE)))
my_breaks <- seq(-max_val, max_val, length.out = 101)
# FIX: Use a more vibrant Blue-Yellow-Red palette
my_palette <- colorRampPalette(rev(brewer.pal(n = 11, name = "RdYlBu")))(100)

## 3) DRAW THE HEATMAPS -------------------------------------------------------
msg("Generating heatmaps…")

# --- Define shared annotation elements ---
annotation_col <- data.frame(Group = meta_dh$Group, row.names = meta_dh$SampleID)
all_fun_levels <- unique(c(names(hyper_cpg_groups), names(hypo_cpg_groups)))
all_fun_cols <- setNames(
  brewer.pal(max(3, length(all_fun_levels)), "Set3")[seq_along(all_fun_levels)],
  all_fun_levels
)
annotation_colors <- list(
  Group            = c("No Metastasis"="#4575b4","Metastasis"="#d73027"),
  Functional_Group = all_fun_cols
)

# --- Heatmap 1: Hyper-methylated ---
pdf(file.path(output_dir,"heatmap_DH_hyper.pdf"), width=10, height=10)
pheatmap(hyper_data$matrix, scale="row", color=my_palette, breaks=my_breaks,
         cluster_rows=FALSE, cluster_cols=FALSE,
         annotation_row=hyper_data$annotation_row,
         annotation_col=annotation_col,
         annotation_colors=annotation_colors,
         show_colnames=TRUE, fontsize_row=8, fontsize_col=6,
         main="Hyper-methylated CpGs")
dev.off()

# --- Heatmap 2: Hypo-methylated (with safety check) ---
if (nrow(hypo_data$matrix) > 0) {
  pdf(file.path(output_dir,"heatmap_DH_hypo.pdf"), width=10, height=10)
  pheatmap(hypo_data$matrix, scale="row", color=my_palette, breaks=my_breaks,
           cluster_rows=FALSE, cluster_cols=FALSE,
           annotation_row=hypo_data$annotation_row,
           annotation_col=annotation_col,
           annotation_colors=annotation_colors,
           show_colnames=TRUE, fontsize_row=8, fontsize_col=6,
           main="Hypo-methylated CpGs")
  dev.off()
  msg("✅ PDFs for hyper and hypo heatmaps written to ", output_dir)
} else {
  msg("✅ Wrote only hyper PDF to ", output_dir, " (no hypo CpGs found in data)")
}
```

Heatmaps with Functional groups but on one plot
```{r}
###############################################################################
#  heatmap_publication_figure_final.R
#  - Creates a single, publication-quality heatmap for the "Any Metastasis"
#    phenotype, with rows split by hyper/hypo status and functionally ordered.
#  - Loads top CpGs from a pre-computed, cell-type-adjusted EWAS.
###############################################################################

## ---------------- USER SETTINGS ------------------------------------------ ##
# Paths to your data files
path_my_epic_v1 <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/All_Data/DNA_Methylation/dm_data/no_match/idats/"
path_my_epic_v2 <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/All_Data/DNA_Methylation/dm_data/no_match/25_samples/"
path_my_meta    <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/data_all.csv"

# --- Path to your pre-computed EWAS results folder ---
ewas_results_dir <- "results_ewas_any_noSex" 
h_level          <- "H5"
tier             <- "Tier3"

# Number of top hyper and hypo CpGs to include
top_n <- 50

# Where to save the output plot
output_dir <- "results_publication_figure"
dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE)

## --- Curated CpG groups for annotation ---
functional_groups <- list(
  `Tumor Suppressor` = c("cg21878275", "cg22329127"), # ADAMTS9, SFRP1
  `ECM & Adhesion`   = c("cg12567310","cg06355010","cg00919305","cg05542785","cg02987928", "cg01865179","cg10893048"),
  `Signaling & Proliferation` = c("cg26018901","cg02384486","cg04101351","cg02983495",
                                "cg07919466","cg16190211","cg03496114","cg12751521","cg06951626",
                                "cg00100844", "cg14137625", "cg24176288", "cg06741896", "cg25819846", "cg14383549", "cg11003133"),
  `Trafficking`      = c("cg21161492","cg11589947","cg09635067","cg18187581"),
  `Gene Regulation`  = c("cg24671348","cg03999372","cg14429204","cg07831351",
                         "cg25283029","cg18878907","cg13209567","cg18598844","cg00201175",
                         "cg19628988", "cg24478129", "cg04093349", "cg14255238", "cg27598407", "cg26472183", "cg21834645", "cg12459932"),
  `Metabolism`       = c("cg25161512","cg16264705","cg13831329","cg10836173","cg07437373"),
  `Survival`         = c("cg09586459","cg01901788","cg16342439"),
  `Developmental TFs`= c("cg13621457","cg03581781","cg21045572", "cg26522592", "cg18716076", "cg07584855", "cg23936031", "cg10244666"),
  `Wnt Pathway`      = c("cg02373039"),
  `Ion Transport`    = c("cg07186154", "cg07581739"),
  `Other`            = c("cg14115815", "cg08235287")
)

## ---------------- SETUP -------------------------------------------------- ##
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(minfi); library(limma); library(pheatmap); library(sesame); library(dplyr)
  library(readr); library(tibble); library(RColorBrewer)
  library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
})

msg <- \(...) cat("[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "] ", ..., "\n")

process_idats <- function(paths, cache_name, collapse_v2 = FALSE) {
  rds <- file.path(output_dir, cache_name)
  if (file.exists(rds)) return(readRDS(rds))
  msg("Processing: ", cache_name)
  rg  <- read.metharray(basenames = unique(sub("_Grn.idat|_Red.idat","",paths)), force=TRUE)
  bet <- getBeta(preprocessNoob(rg))
  if (collapse_v2) bet <- sesame::betasCollapseToPfx(bet)
  saveRDS(bet, rds); bet
}

## 1) LOAD DATA & GET TOP CPGs FROM PRE-COMPUTED EWAS -----------------------
msg("--- Loading Data and Pre-computed EWAS Results ---")
beta_v1 <- process_idats(list.files(path_my_epic_v1, full.names = TRUE, pattern = "idat$"), "dh_v1.rds")
beta_v2 <- process_idats(list.files(path_my_epic_v2, full.names = TRUE, pattern = "idat$"), "dh_v2.rds", collapse_v2 = TRUE)
common  <- intersect(rownames(beta_v1), rownames(beta_v2))
beta_dh <- cbind(beta_v1[common, ], beta_v2[common, ])

meta_dh <- read_csv(path_my_meta, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    SampleID = paste(Sentrix_ID, Sentrix_Position, sep="_"),
    Group    = factor(if_else(any_mets==1,"Metastasis","No Metastasis"),
                      levels=c("No Metastasis","Metastasis"))
  ) %>%
  filter(SampleID %in% colnames(beta_dh))

fit_file <- file.path(ewas_results_dir, h_level, "ewas_fits.rds")
if (!file.exists(fit_file)) stop("EWAS results file not found!")
fits <- readRDS(fit_file)
fit_obj <- fits[["Tier3"]]$fit

top_table <- topTable(fit_obj, coef = "pheno_bin", number = Inf)
top_hyper_cpgs <- top_table %>% filter(logFC > 0) %>% head(top_n) %>% rownames()
top_hypo_cpgs  <- top_table %>% filter(logFC < 0) %>% head(top_n) %>% rownames()

## 2) PREPARE FOR PLOTTING --------------------------------------------------
msg("Building ordered CpG lists and annotations…")
anno_tbl   <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
probe2gene <- setNames(sub(";.*$", "", anno_tbl$UCSC_RefGene_Name), anno_tbl$Name)

final_cpgs_to_plot <- c(top_hyper_cpgs, top_hypo_cpgs)
gap_row      <- length(top_hyper_cpgs)

heatmap_labels <- sapply(final_cpgs_to_plot, function(cpg_id) {
  gene_name <- probe2gene[cpg_id]
  if (!is.na(gene_name) && nzchar(gene_name)) {
    return(paste(gene_name, cpg_id, sep = "_"))
  } else { return(cpg_id) }
})

## 3) BUILD ANNOTATIONS & MATRICES -----------------------------------------
meta_ord <- meta_dh %>% arrange(Group)
mat <- beta_dh[final_cpgs_to_plot, meta_ord$SampleID]
rownames(mat) <- heatmap_labels

annotation_col <- meta_ord %>% dplyr::select(Group) %>% as.data.frame()
rownames(annotation_col) <- meta_ord$SampleID

find_group <- function(cpg) {
  for (nm in names(functional_groups)) {
    if (cpg %in% functional_groups[[nm]]) return(nm)
  }
  "Other"
}
annotation_row <- data.frame(
  Functional_Group = factor(sapply(final_cpgs_to_plot, find_group),
                           levels = unique(names(functional_groups)))
)
rownames(annotation_row) <- heatmap_labels

func_lvls <- levels(annotation_row$Functional_Group)
func_cols <- setNames(
  brewer.pal(max(3, length(func_lvls)), "Set3")[seq_along(func_lvls)],
  func_lvls
)
annotation_colors <- list(
  Group            = c("No Metastasis"="#4575b4","Metastasis"="#d73027"),
  Functional_Group = func_cols
)

## 4) PLOT & SAVE ------------------------------------------------------------
pdf(file.path("/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results/results_publication_figure/heatmap_DH_functional_split.pdf"), width = 12, height = 14)
pheatmap(
  mat,
  scale             = "row",
  cluster_rows      = FALSE,
  cluster_cols      = FALSE,
  gaps_row          = gap_row,
  annotation_col    = annotation_col,
  annotation_row    = annotation_row,
  annotation_colors = annotation_colors,
  show_colnames     = TRUE,
  fontsize_row      = 8,
  fontsize_col      = 6,
  main              = ""
)
dev.off()

msg("✅  Vector heatmap saved to ", file.path("/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results/results_publication_figure/heatmap_DH_functional_split.pdf"))
```


Functional split but with less CpG's
```{r}
###############################################################################
#  heatmap_DH_cohort_publication_split.R
#  - Creates a single, publication-quality heatmap for "Any Metastasis"
#    with rows split by hyper/hypo status and functionally annotated.
#  - Loads top CpGs from a pre-computed EWAS.
###############################################################################

## ---------------- USER SETTINGS ------------------------------------------ ##
# Paths to your data files
path_my_epic_v1 <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/All_Data/DNA_Methylation/dm_data/no_match/idats/"
path_my_epic_v2 <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/All_Data/DNA_Methylation/dm_data/no_match/25_samples/"
path_my_meta    <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/data_all.csv"

# --- Path to your pre-computed EWAS results folder ---
ewas_results_dir <- "results_ewas_any_noSex" 
h_level          <- "H5"
tier             <- "Tier3"

# Number of top hyper and hypo CpGs to include
top_n <- 50

# Where to save the output plot
# Define the main results directory once at the top
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"

# Construct full paths for inputs and outputs from the root directory
summary_dir <- file.path(results_root, "results_summary")
output_dir  <- file.path(results_root, "results_publication_figure")
dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

## --- Curated CpG groups for annotation ---
functional_groups <- list(
  `Tumor Suppressor` = c("cg21878275", "cg22329127"), # ADAMTS9, SFRP1
  `ECM & Adhesion`   = c("cg12567310","cg06355010","cg00919305","cg05542785","cg02987928", "cg01865179","cg10893048"),
  `Signaling & Proliferation` = c("cg26018901","cg02384486","cg04101351","cg02983495",
                                "cg07919466","cg16190211","cg03496114","cg12751521","cg06951626",
                                "cg00100844", "cg14137625", "cg24176288", "cg06741896", "cg25819846", "cg14383549", "cg11003133"),
  `Trafficking`      = c("cg21161492","cg11589947","cg09635067","cg18187581"),
  `Gene Regulation`  = c("cg24671348","cg03999372","cg14429204","cg07831351",
                         "cg25283029","cg18878907","cg13209567","cg18598844","cg00201175",
                         "cg19628988", "cg24478129", "cg04093349", "cg14255238", "cg27598407", "cg26472183", "cg21834645", "cg12459932"),
  `Metabolism`       = c("cg25161512","cg16264705","cg13831329","cg10836173","cg07437373"),
  `Survival`         = c("cg09586459","cg01901788","cg16342439"),
  `Developmental TFs`= c("cg13621457","cg03581781","cg21045572", "cg26522592", "cg18716076", "cg07584855", "cg23936031", "cg10244666"),
  `Wnt Pathway`      = c("cg02373039"),
  `Ion Transport`    = c("cg07186154", "cg07581739"),
  `Other`            = c("cg14115815", "cg08235287")
)

## ---------------- SETUP -------------------------------------------------- ##
suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(minfi); library(limma); library(pheatmap); library(sesame); library(dplyr)
  library(readr); library(tibble); library(RColorBrewer)
  library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
})

msg <- function(...) cat("[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "]", ..., "\n")
process_idats <- function(paths, cache_name, collapse_v2 = FALSE) {
  rds <- file.path(output_dir, cache_name)
  if (file.exists(rds)) return(readRDS(rds))
  msg("Processing: ", cache_name)
  rg  <- read.metharray(basenames = unique(sub("_Grn.idat|_Red.idat","",paths)), force=TRUE)
  bet <- getBeta(preprocessNoob(rg))
  if (collapse_v2) bet <- sesame::betasCollapseToPfx(bet)
  saveRDS(bet, rds); bet
}
cluster_inside <- function(cpgs, mat) {
  if (length(cpgs) <= 2) return(cpgs)
  cpgs[hclust(dist(mat[cpgs, ]))$order]
}

## 1) LOAD DATA & GET TOP CPGs FROM PRE-COMPUTED EWAS -----------------------
msg("--- Loading Data and Pre-computed EWAS Results ---")
beta_v1 <- process_idats(list.files(path_my_epic_v1, full.names = TRUE, pattern = "idat$"), "dh_v1.rds")
beta_v2 <- process_idats(list.files(path_my_epic_v2, full.names = TRUE, pattern = "idat$"), "dh_v2.rds", collapse_v2 = TRUE)
common  <- intersect(rownames(beta_v1), rownames(beta_v2))
beta_dh <- cbind(beta_v1[common, ], beta_v2[common, ])

meta_dh <- read_csv(path_my_meta, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    SampleID = paste(Sentrix_ID, Sentrix_Position, sep="_"),
    Group    = factor(if_else(any_mets==1,"Metastasis","No Metastasis"),
                      levels=c("No Metastasis","Metastasis"))
  ) %>%
  filter(SampleID %in% colnames(beta_dh))

fit_file <- file.path(ewas_results_dir, h_level, "ewas_fits.rds")
if (!file.exists(fit_file)) stop("EWAS results file not found!")
fits <- readRDS(fit_file)
fit_obj <- fits[["Tier3"]]$fit

top_table <- topTable(fit_obj, coef = "pheno_bin", number = Inf)
top_hyper_cpgs <- top_table %>% filter(logFC > 0) %>% head(top_n) %>% rownames()
top_hypo_cpgs  <- top_table %>% filter(logFC < 0) %>% head(top_n) %>% rownames()

## 2) PREPARE FOR PLOTTING --------------------------------------------------
msg("Building ordered CpG lists and annotations…")
anno_tbl   <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
probe2gene <- setNames(sub(";.*$", "", anno_tbl$UCSC_RefGene_Name), anno_tbl$Name)

# Filter functional groups to only those CpGs in our top lists
hyper_in <- lapply(functional_groups, intersect, top_hyper_cpgs)
hypo_in  <- lapply(functional_groups, intersect, top_hypo_cpgs)
hyper_in <- hyper_in[lengths(hyper_in) > 0]
hypo_in  <- hypo_in[lengths(hypo_in) > 0]

# Cluster CpGs *within* each functional group
hyper_ord <- unlist(lapply(hyper_in, cluster_inside, beta_dh), use.names=FALSE)
hypo_ord  <- unlist(lapply(hypo_in,  cluster_inside, beta_dh), use.names=FALSE)

final_cpgs_to_plot <- c(hyper_ord, hypo_ord)
gap_row <- length(hyper_ord)

# Create unique gene labels (Gene_CpGID)
heatmap_labels <- sapply(final_cpgs_to_plot, function(cpg_id) {
  gene_name <- probe2gene[cpg_id]
  if (!is.na(gene_name) && nzchar(gene_name)) {
    return(paste(gene_name, cpg_id, sep = "_"))
  } else { return(cpg_id) }
})

## 3) BUILD ANNOTATIONS & MATRICES -----------------------------------------
meta_ord <- meta_dh %>% arrange(Group)
mat <- beta_dh[final_cpgs_to_plot, meta_ord$SampleID]
rownames(mat) <- heatmap_labels

annotation_col <- meta_ord %>% dplyr::select(Group) %>% as.data.frame()
rownames(annotation_col) <- meta_ord$SampleID

# Create row annotation
find_group <- function(cpg) {
  for (nm in names(functional_groups)) {
    if (cpg %in% functional_groups[[nm]]) return(nm)
  }
  "Other"
}
annotation_row <- data.frame(
  Functional_Group = factor(sapply(final_cpgs_to_plot, find_group),
                           levels = unique(names(functional_groups)))
)
rownames(annotation_row) <- heatmap_labels

# Create a dynamic color palette for the functional groups
func_lvls <- levels(annotation_row$Functional_Group)
func_cols <- setNames(
  brewer.pal(max(3, length(func_lvls)), "Set3")[seq_along(func_lvls)],
  func_lvls
)
annotation_colors <- list(
  Group            = c("No Metastasis"="#4575b4","Metastasis"="#d73027"),
  Functional_Group = func_cols
)

## 4) PLOT & SAVE ------------------------------------------------------------
pdf(file.path(output_dir, "heatmap_DH_functional_split.pdf"), width = 12, height = 14)
pheatmap(
  mat,
  scale             = "row",
  cluster_rows      = FALSE,
  cluster_cols      = FALSE,
  gaps_row          = gap_row,
  annotation_col    = annotation_col,
  annotation_row    = annotation_row,
  annotation_colors = annotation_colors,
  show_colnames     = TRUE,
  fontsize_row      = 8,
  fontsize_col      = 6,
  main              = ""
)
dev.off()

msg("✅  Vector heatmap saved to ", file.path(output_dir, "heatmap_DH_functional_split.pdf"))
```


Heatmap with No mets and Mets with functional groups
```{r}
################################################################################
# heatmap_publication_functional_annotation.R
# - Creates a single, publication-quality heatmap for the "Any Metastasis"
#   phenotype, with rows split by hyper/hypo status.
# - Rows are ordered by functional groups and annotated accordingly.
################################################################################

## ---------------- USER SETTINGS ------------------------------------------ ##
# Paths to your data files
path_my_epic_v1 <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/All_Data/DNA_Methylation/dm_data/no_match/idats/"
path_my_epic_v2 <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/All_Data/DNA_Methylation/dm_data/no_match/25_samples/"
path_my_meta    <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Data_Documents/data_all.csv"

# Where to save the output plot
# Define the main results directory once at the top
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"

# Construct full paths for inputs and outputs from the root directory
summary_dir <- file.path(results_root, "results_summary")
output_dir  <- file.path(results_root, "results_publication_figure")
dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Number of top hyper and hypo CpGs to include
top_n <- 50

# --- Curated CpG groups for annotation ---
# NOTE: Please review and edit these functional groups based on your research.
# This is a sample categorization based on the provided CpG list.
functional_groups <- list(
  `Gene Regulation & TFs` = c("cg12361126", "cg24893073", "cg27592331", "cg26245086", "cg06800070", "cg26744554", "cg00930606", "cg26857315", "cg27251219", "cg03581781", "cg10244666", "cg02386822", "cg08677627", "cg00575744", "cg24930480", "cg02454877", "cg03516836"),
  `Signaling & Proliferation` = c("cg04888241", "cg14439101", "cg09403098", "cg03170192", "cg10789824", "cg26522543", "cg20715295", "cg26019533", "cg04105966"),
  `Metabolism` = c("cg11271451", "cg22894232", "cg06346081", "cg20453216", "cg21271753"),
  `Cell Adhesion & ECM` = c("cg05999983", "cg08295502", "cg25739225"),
  `Ion Transport` = c("cg06871008"),
  `Development` = c("cg10853012", "cg23355745"),
  `Immune Response` = c("cg27650654", "cg00299736"),
  `Structural / Cytoskeletal` = c("cg16658020", "cg07349473", "cg10431340"),
  `Other Function` = c("cg18915211", "cg15935770", "cg15834506", "cg15251311", "cg18349077", "cg01837574", "cg16289449", "cg01606023", "cg05088898", "cg04830056", "cg04399598", "cg12900583", "cg08293947", "cg19319792", "cg26430041", "cg02355924", "cg20249500", "cg12810003", "cg26335865", "cg07807697", "cg07857137", "cg14216102", "cg23448899", "cg00457095"),
  `Unknown / Intergenic` = c("cg06215984", "cg10463073", "cg13938959", "cg08164151", "cg19533760", "cg09304803", "cg16945428", "cg04462650", "cg03370451", "cg27073349", "cg21520103", "cg12828483", "cg24737949", "cg00887508", "cg10220449", "cg17425143", "cg27614666", "cg17258702", "cg19462052", "cg07563033", "cg27461730", "cg09469102", "cg14905314", "cg15082257", "cg13063369", "cg11221509", "cg14121665", "cg07871859", "cg06975325", "cg06192890", "cg25674729", "cg21506528", "cg20242070")
)


################################################################################
##  SETUP & HELPERS
################################################################################
msg <- \(...) cat("[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "] ", ..., "\n")

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(minfi); library(limma); library(pheatmap); library(sesame)
  library(dplyr); library(readr); library(glue); library(tibble)
  library(RColorBrewer)
  library(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
})

# Helper to process iDATs, normalize, and cache
process_idats <- function(idat_paths, cache_name, collapse_v2 = FALSE) {
  cache_file <- file.path(output_dir, cache_name)
  if (file.exists(cache_file)) {
    msg("Loading cached beta matrix: ", cache_name)
    return(readRDS(cache_file))
  }
  msg("Processing iDATs for: ", cache_name)
  basenames <- unique(sub("_Grn.idat|_Red.idat", "", idat_paths))
  rg_set <- read.metharray(basenames = basenames, force = TRUE)
  m_set <- preprocessNoob(rg_set)
  beta <- getBeta(m_set)
  if (collapse_v2) { beta <- sesame::betasCollapseToPfx(beta) }
  saveRDS(beta, cache_file)
  return(beta)
}

# Helper to cluster CpGs within a functional group
cluster_inside <- function(cpgs, mat) {
  if (length(cpgs) <= 2) return(cpgs)
  cpgs[hclust(dist(mat[cpgs, ]))$order]
}

################################################################################
##  1. LOAD DATA AND IDENTIFY TOP CpGs
################################################################################
msg("--- Loading Data and Identifying Top CpGs ---")

# --- Load and combine your EPIC v1 and v2 data ---
beta_v1 <- process_idats(list.files(path_my_epic_v1, full.names=TRUE, pattern="idat$"), "dh_beta_v1.rds")
beta_v2 <- process_idats(list.files(path_my_epic_v2, full.names=TRUE, pattern="idat$"), "dh_beta_v2.rds", collapse_v2 = TRUE)
common_probes_dh <- intersect(rownames(beta_v1), rownames(beta_v2))
beta_dh <- cbind(beta_v1[common_probes_dh, ], beta_v2[common_probes_dh, ])

# --- Run limma on your data to get the top hits ---
meta_dh <- read_csv(path_my_meta, show_col_types = FALSE) %>%
  mutate(
    SampleID = paste(Sentrix_ID, Sentrix_Position, sep = "_"),
    Group = factor(if_else(any_mets == 1, "Metastasis", "No Metastasis"),
                   levels = c("No Metastasis", "Metastasis"))
  ) %>%
  filter(SampleID %in% colnames(beta_dh))
meta_dh <- meta_dh[match(colnames(beta_dh), meta_dh$SampleID), ]

epsilon <- 1e-6
m_val_dh <- log2(pmax(pmin(beta_dh, 1 - epsilon), epsilon) / (1 - pmax(pmin(beta_dh, 1 - epsilon), epsilon)))
design <- model.matrix(~ Group, data = meta_dh)
fit <- eBayes(lmFit(m_val_dh, design))
top_table <- topTable(fit, coef = "GroupMetastasis", number = Inf)

# Get top hyper and hypo lists
top_hyper_cpgs <- top_table %>% filter(logFC > 0) %>% head(top_n) %>% rownames()
top_hypo_cpgs  <- top_table %>% filter(logFC < 0) %>% head(top_n) %>% rownames()

################################################################################
##  2. CREATE ORDERED CpG LISTS BASED ON FUNCTIONAL GROUPS
################################################################################
msg("--- Ordering CpGs by Functional Group for Plotting ---")

# --- Filter functional groups to only include CpGs in our top lists ---
hyper_in_func_groups <- lapply(functional_groups, intersect, top_hyper_cpgs)
hypo_in_func_groups  <- lapply(functional_groups, intersect, top_hypo_cpgs)
hyper_in_func_groups <- hyper_in_func_groups[lengths(hyper_in_func_groups) > 0]
hypo_in_func_groups  <- hypo_in_func_groups[lengths(hypo_in_func_groups) > 0]

# --- Cluster CpGs *within* each functional group and create final ordered list ---
hyper_ordered <- unlist(lapply(hyper_in_func_groups, cluster_inside, beta_dh), use.names=FALSE)
hypo_ordered  <- unlist(lapply(hypo_in_func_groups,  cluster_inside, beta_dh), use.names=FALSE)

final_cpgs_to_plot <- c(hyper_ordered, hypo_ordered)
gap_row_position <- length(hyper_ordered)

# --- Create unique gene labels (e.g., "GATA6_cg27592331") ---
anno <- getAnnotation(IlluminaHumanMethylationEPICanno.ilm10b4.hg19)
probe2gene <- setNames(sub(";.*$", "", anno$UCSC_RefGene_Name), anno$Name)

heatmap_labels <- sapply(final_cpgs_to_plot, function(cpg) {
  gene_name <- probe2gene[cpg]
  if (!is.na(gene_name) && nzchar(gene_name)) {
    return(paste(gene_name, cpg, sep = "_"))
  } else {
    return(cpg)
  }
})

################################################################################
##  3. PREPARE ANNOTATIONS AND GENERATE HEATMAP
################################################################################
msg("--- Generating Final Publication Heatmap ---")

# --- Prepare column (sample) annotation ---
meta_ordered <- meta_dh %>% arrange(Group)
annotation_col <- meta_ordered %>% dplyr::select(Group) %>% as.data.frame()
rownames(annotation_col) <- meta_ordered$SampleID

# --- Prepare row (CpG) annotation ---
find_group <- function(cpg) {
  for (nm in names(functional_groups)) {
    if (cpg %in% functional_groups[[nm]]) return(nm)
  }
  return("Unknown / Intergenic") # Fallback category
}
annotation_row <- data.frame(
  Functional_Group = factor(sapply(final_cpgs_to_plot, find_group),
                            levels = names(functional_groups))
)
rownames(annotation_row) <- heatmap_labels

# --- FIX: Hide the row annotation legend title ---
colnames(annotation_row) <- " "

# --- Prepare colors for all annotations ---
func_group_levels <- levels(annotation_row[[1]]) # Access by index now
func_group_colors <- colorRampPalette(brewer.pal(9, "Set1"))(length(func_group_levels))

annotation_colors <- list(
  Group = c("No Metastasis" = "#4575b4", "Metastasis" = "#d73027"),
  ` ` = setNames(func_group_colors, func_group_levels) # Use the new blank name
)

# --- Prepare final matrix for plotting ---
mat_ordered <- beta_dh[final_cpgs_to_plot, meta_ordered$SampleID]
rownames(mat_ordered) <- heatmap_labels

# --- Generate the Heatmap and save to PDF ---
pheatmap(
  mat_ordered,
  annotation_col = annotation_col,
  annotation_row = annotation_row,
  annotation_colors = annotation_colors,
  main = "",
  show_colnames = FALSE,
  cluster_rows = FALSE, 
  cluster_cols = FALSE, 
  scale = "row",
  fontsize_row = 7,
  gaps_row = c(gap_row_position), 
  filename = file.path(output_dir, "heatmap_DH_cohort_functional_annotated.pdf"),
  width = 10,
  height = 14
)

msg("\n✅  Final DH cohort heatmap with functional annotations saved successfully.")
```

```{r}
################################################################################
# SCRIPT: heatmap_from_curated_list.R (FINAL VERSION)
# PURPOSE:
#   Use a manually provided list of CpGs to create a heatmap. This version
#   handles duplicate CpGs by keeping the entry with the lowest p-value.
#
# INPUTS:
#   - A user-provided list of CpGs (defined in Section 2).
#   - beta_comb (in memory from your EWAS script)
#   - meta_csv  (path to metadata file)
#
# OUTPUTS:
#   - heatmap_beta_hypermethylated.pdf
#   - heatmap_beta_hypomethylated.pdf
################################################################################

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(dplyr); library(glue); library(readr); library(tibble)
  library(pheatmap); library(RColorBrewer)
})

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 1. Define paths and parameters
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
results_root <- "/Users/adiallo/Desktop/Thesis/Results"
output_dir <- file.path(results_root, "results_publication_figure")
dir.create(output_dir, showWarnings = FALSE, recursive = TRUE)

# Ensure the required objects from your main script are available
stopifnot(exists("beta_comb"))
stopifnot(exists("meta_csv"))

msg <- function(...) cat("[", format(Sys.time(), "%H:%M:%S"), "]", ..., "\n")

# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
# 2. Load Your Curated CpG List and Handle Duplicates 🧬
# ------------------------------------------------------------------------------
msg("Loading the user-provided curated CpG list...")

# Paste the tab-separated data you provided here.
cpg_text_data <- "
CpG_ID	Gene	logFC	P.Value
cg19020602	CAPN13	-1.200366501	1.09E-05
cg26750188	JMJD8	1.714528763	5.43E-05
cg12691739	CA10	-1.121074564	7.01E-05
cg09304803	NA	1.269175213	7.92E-05
cg23355745	LINC00424	-1.152236275	9.55E-05
cg14501323	GALNT14	-1.0453368	1.30E-04
cg04888241	ADRA2C	1.478186281	2.05E-04
cg27498387	ANK1	-1.110161429	2.21E-04
cg16756764	NA	-0.884691544	2.53E-04
cg06224587	NA	1.053002187	2.93E-04
cg04165214	NA	-0.975354308	3.24E-04
cg11895993	FER1L6-AS2	-0.948939953	3.25E-04
cg06631010	SLIT2	1.494708577	3.38E-04
cg14362370	ABL1	0.810419006	3.61E-04
cg26996201	PAK1	-1.574466995	4.40E-04
cg24529549	C10orf11	-0.955556119	4.47E-04
cg10573232	CCDC60	1.42612803	4.88E-04
cg16474170	PTPRM	1.354714465	4.98E-04
cg24396358	HLA-DOA	-1.006500543	5.21E-04
cg21056723	LOC644145	-1.180958339	5.45E-04
cg26166804	H2AFY2	1.359900986	5.60E-04
cg19221542	NA	-0.885176304	6.21E-04
cg18886245	TFAP2B	-1.151655922	6.86E-04
cg24480555	C8orf33	0.884423034	7.85E-04
cg20964064	KCNQ2	1.064951019	7.99E-04
cg13831596	ATP7B	0.814126873	8.23E-04
cg11287055	DSCR3	-1.724188503	9.13E-04
cg07702509	SNORA39	1.053422132	9.17E-04
cg10213101	NA	-0.88937643	9.21E-04
cg10655471	SPTBN4	1.169433459	9.94E-04
cg15620908	NA	-1.443271734	2.91E-05
cg22595230	CENPB	1.321039726	1.48E-04
cg22444562	GPR1-AS	-2.912203291	1.65E-04
cg20880234	ZMYM2	-1.515376137	4.30E-04
cg24265806	FAM126A	-1.259162802	6.20E-04
cg25751787	NA	-1.04823444	6.24E-04
cg02959678	ABCA7	1.371366118	7.95E-04
cg25840237	NA	-1.109323624	8.03E-04
cg18823007	NA	-1.097278052	8.23E-04
cg15584445	LOC100190940	1.496749493	8.35E-04
cg02858402	GOLT1A	1.301995258	8.68E-04
cg26871905	NA	-0.930276006	9.85E-04
cg09390241	NA	1.627391501	5.84E-06
cg07420190	MARK1	2.135372057	1.38E-05
cg04941073	MARK1	2.289441743	2.47E-05
cg07150925	BSN	1.808177597	2.85E-05
cg08151750	FNDC4	2.073036454	4.70E-05
cg13137176	FAM150B	2.108953586	4.99E-05
cg23721712	HLA-L	1.747301452	5.08E-05
cg03998871	ELOVL5	2.225928865	5.17E-05
cg12109566	HLA-L	1.512658997	6.14E-05
cg10791959	EPHB1	-0.908820117	6.84E-05
cg04258219	NA	1.388834407	7.37E-05
cg20347477	FAM69B	1.392887395	9.48E-05
cg07078114	FAM69B	1.484721887	9.73E-05
cg05847960	NA	1.385343651	1.14E-04
cg13389209	COL5A1	1.035261847	1.20E-04
cg02259934	NA	1.398877096	1.31E-04
cg18326657	HLA-L	1.555388007	1.37E-04
cg26266427	TNXB	1.04393385	1.50E-04
cg19858576	LRRC14B	1.500861828	1.50E-04
cg26844603	TMEM87B	1.074364566	1.56E-04
cg18532273	RASA3	1.082023474	1.58E-04
cg06220235	SOCS1	1.780982063	1.62E-04
cg19608455	MAPK4	1.269291348	1.64E-04
cg04293085	ADRA1D	1.487431999	1.64E-04
cg26275046	NA	1.224557656	1.69E-04
cg04199943	HLA-L	1.562334937	1.70E-04
cg07385694	GALNT9	1.161474307	1.77E-04
cg00382463	NA	1.559739989	1.81E-04
cg16468914	SLC38A3	1.755529863	1.82E-04
cg10030636	NAT8L	1.230634339	1.83E-04

cg07454491	C12orf68	-1.179433688	1.89E-04
cg05059566	PRDM8	1.237500979	1.90E-04
cg11362988	NA	1.490825422	1.91E-04
cg16250461	HLA-L	1.540907732	1.99E-04
cg03906820	GPR123	1.15563835	2.00E-04
cg04501878	ZDHHC22	1.406143745	2.09E-04
cg23598080	LHX4	1.237780079	2.13E-04
cg14852134	NA	1.352660983	2.13E-04
cg23071120	NA	1.432672702	2.14E-04
cg03431655	C3orf50	1.693843144	2.15E-04
cg03775163	NA	1.297650824	2.17E-04
cg08541518	BAI3	1.187971977	2.29E-04
cg21697172	C14orf39	-1.186657913	2.36E-04
cg07965995	NXN	1.066696454	2.37E-04
cg17754876	SLC1A2	1.152235918	2.41E-04

cg18492647	RASGRP2	1.266189811	2.52E-04
```
